title: Ultimate Auto Repair Station
brief:
Nip danger in the bud! Continuously repair damaged buildings and items in the colony!
The Ultimate Auto Repair Station is here!

A must-have device for home and travel in the archotech world, automatically checks for damage in the home space and continuously repairs them! 
As long as there is one Ultimate Auto Repair Station in operation, all buildings and items in the entire colony will be continuously repaired!
Keep your colony in top shape at all times, ready to face any challenge!
description:
Automatically repair anything within the specified active area, including buildings and objects.

Repair statistics can be viewed to check for unusual areas.
